title: eryngium marginatum
intro: Eryngium marginatum, also known as the Mexican sea holly, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Eryngium marginatum are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
